data.title: Denver Mattress and The Salvation Army celebrate successful 2025 holiday campaign "Together Doing Even More Good".
data.description: In Denver on January 15, 2026, Denver Mattress Company and The Salvation Army Intermountain Division marked a successful year for their "Together Doing Even More Good" holiday campaign. Running from Thanksgiving to Christmas in 2025, the campaign achieved remarkable results.

data.title: Cherokee Federal companies secure 12 MDA SHIELD contracts, enhancing defense capabilities at scale in Tulsa, Okla.
data.description: TULSA, Oklahoma - On January 15, 2026, Cherokee Federal, a division of Cherokee Nation Businesses, was acknowledged by the Missile Defense Agency for their proficiency in swiftly competing and providing top-tier defense capabilities on a large scale. The recognition was awarded to 12 companies within the Cherokee Federal portfolio. This accomplishment highlights the organization's capability and commitment to delivering quality services in the defense sector.

data.title: VTS had record growth in 2025, becoming largest AI-powered real estate tech platform with launch of VTS AI.
data.description: In New York, VTS, a technology platform for the real estate industry, reported unprecedented growth in 2025. This surge can be attributed to the successful introduction of VTS AI, which stands out as the top AI-powered technology platform in the sector. Fueled by cutting-edge data and technology, VTS AI is transforming real estate work functions.

data.title: Karman Industries introduces Heat Processing Unit (HPU) in Los Angeles, catering to giga-scale AI thermal needs.
data.description: Karman Industries, based in Los Angeles, has unveiled the Heat Processing Unit (HPU) in a recent announcement. This new product launch is set to revolutionize the industry as it combines state-of-the-art technology with innovative design. The HPU is expected to have a significant impact on the market with its cutting-edge features and functionality. Stay tuned as Karman Industries continues to push boundaries and set new standards in the industry.

data.title: FillPoint Health & US Heart & Vascular partner to expand access to therapies in cardiology in underserved areas.
data.description: A collaboration between FillPoint Health and USHV in Dublin, Ohio is striving to extend a scalable care model to aid underserved regions in cardiology. The ongoing partnership aims to further its reach and impact.

data.title: Data Center World expanding with new 2026 international event series in Asia, Australia, Brazil, Europe. Global reach growing.
data.description: In response to the surging demand for AI technology, Data Center World, a leading global event for data center IT infrastructure and innovation, is expanding its reach internationally in 2026. The flagship U.S. conference will now be joined by new events in Asia, Australia, Brazil, and Europe. This major expansion comes as governments, utilities, and enterprises worldwide aim to keep pace with the growing demand for AI-driven solutions. The expansion will offer a platform for industry professionals to connect and stay updated on the latest trends in the sector.

data.title: California, Texas, and Florida had the highest hospitality hiring demand in late 2025, according to OysterLink data. -  134 characters
data.description: According to a recent analysis by OysterLink in Q4 2025, there has been a significant increase in job postings in the hospitality industry as it prepares to enter 2026. The data reveals that employers in the hospitality sector are actively seeking new talent, with a rise in hiring demand observed during the last quarter. This trend indicates a positive outlook for job seekers in the industry, with the numbers pointing towards a surge in opportunities within the sector. The analysis suggests that job seekers looking to enter or advance in the hospitality field may find numerous prospects available in the coming year.

data.title: US retirement assets hit record high at $48.1 trillion as of Sep 30, 2025, up 4.5% from June. They represent 34% of all household financial assets.
data.description: As of September 30, 2025, US retirement assets reached $48.1 trillion, showing a 4.5 percent increase from June. This amount represented 34 percent of all household financial assets in the United States by the end of September 2025. The recent statistics reflect a significant growth in retirement savings nationally.

data.title: Reddit stock fell on Thursday due to mixed ad feedback, following report by advertising agencies.
data.description: The value of Reddit stock decreased on Thursday due to reports of varied opinions from advertising agencies. An analyst's warning highlighted the mixed feedback, leading to a slump in Reddit's stock. This information was shared on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Senate delays meeting on Clarity Act after Coinbase opposes parts of crypto market bill.
data.description: Meetings regarding the Clarity Act in the Senate committees have been postponed due to opposition from Coinbase over certain aspects of the crypto market structure bill. The delay comes after Coinbase raised concerns about specific provisions in the bill. This setback has caused a halt in the progress of the Clarity Act discussions. The outcome of the delay has yet to be determined, with the postponement impacting the advancement of the bill in the Senate committees. Stay tuned for further developments on this matter.

data.title: Alibaba stock dipped initially but recovered, following the announcement of a major update to its Qwen AI app for shopping.
data.description: After unveiling a significant update to its Qwen AI app, which is geared towards shopping, Alibaba's stock experienced a decline. The Chinese tech giant witnessed a decrease in its stock price following the announcement. Conversely, the stock had been on an upward trend prior to this development. This adjustment to the Qwen AI app signifies Alibaba's commitment to enhancing its shopping experience through artificial intelligence technology. This move by the company may have impacted investor sentiment, resulting in the stock dip. The specific numbers related to the stock decline and subsequent rally were not provided in the original information.

data.title: RLH Equity announced Keystone's technology unit acquired by Audax Private Equity, boosting global expansion.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, RLH Equity Partners shared the news of the acquisition of the global technology and advisory services division of Keystone, a company in their portfolio, by Audax Private Equity. This decision marks a significant development in the industry and reflects the growing trends in mergers and acquisitions. The specific details and financial terms of the deal were not disclosed publicly. This transaction showcases the ongoing evolution and consolidation within the technology and advisory sectors, underscoring the dynamic nature of the market.
